'''Gadaf''' was the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] aboard ''[[Take That!]]'' at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. When [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Falan Iniro]] took his ship out of the debris field prematurely, ''Take That!'' was immediately assailed by [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Gadaf managed to destroy one TIE before it was face-to-face with the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] [[Renthal's Vigilance|''Vigilance'']]. The larger ship easily destroyed ''Take That!'' and all aboard.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
